dashboard.title: ServiceNow Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time incident overview and SLA compliance status.
dashboard.notConfiguredSubtitle: Configure your ServiceNow instance to start viewing incidents and SLA data.
dashboard.syncTooltip: Trigger a manual data sync from ServiceNow

incidents.title: Incidents
incidents.subtitle: Browse and filter incidents fetched from ServiceNow.
incidents.searchPlaceholder: Search by number, title or assignee...
incidents.noIncidentsHint: Try adjusting the filters or sync data from ServiceNow.
incidents.notConfiguredHint: Set up the connection in Configuration → Connection to start fetching incidents.
incidents.fromCacheTooltip: Data is from local cache. Sync to refresh.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: SLA compliance, incident volume, and resolution time analytics.
reports.notConfiguredHint: Set up the connection in Configuration to view reports.
reports.slaComplianceSubtitle: Percentage of resolved incidents meeting SLA targets.
reports.incidentsByPrioritySubtitle: Current active and historical incident distribution.
reports.resolutionTimeSubtitle: Average time (hours) to resolve incidents per priority.

config.title: ServiceNow Configuration
config.subtitle: Manage connection, SLA thresholds, and synchronization settings.

connection.label: Connection
connection.description: Configure the ServiceNow API connection credentials.

sla.label: SLA Thresholds
sla.description: Define resolution time limits per incident priority.

connection.title: ServiceNow Connection
connection.subtitle: Enter your ServiceNow instance credentials. The API token is stored securely on the server.
connection.instanceUrlHint: Your ServiceNow instance base URL (without trailing slash).
connection.usernameHint: ServiceNow user with itil or admin role.
connection.apiTokenHint: Stored securely on the server — never sent to the browser.

sla.title: SLA Thresholds
sla.subtitle: Define maximum resolution time (in hours) for each incident priority. Used for SLA breach detection and compliance reporting.
sla.confirmDescription: update the SLA resolution time thresholds

sync.title: Sync Settings
sync.subtitle: Configure how often PulseOps synchronizes incident data from ServiceNow.
sync.enabledDescription: Automatically sync incident data at the configured interval.
sync.maxIncidentsHint: Maximum incidents to fetch per sync (1–1000).

common.fetchError: Failed to load data from the server.
